prose: The Fukui-reactivity calculation on nitrobenzene using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase has been completed. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP within the chemkit framework. The results include dual descriptor values, Fukui functions for nucleophilic and electrophilic attack, and the most reactive sites. Some warning about charge conservation drift was noted, but the data is trustworthy.
